headlines.title: China Raises Fuel Price Caps Again as Iran War Keeps Oil Markets on Edge

headlines.title: Japan’s Crude Imports from Middle East Slump to Lowest on Record
headlines.summary: Japan in April imported the lowest volume of crude oil from the Middle East on record dating back to 1979 as the Iran war and the de facto closure of the Strait of Hormuz choked supply from the region.
